# data/adam/

This folder contains the **ADaM output datasets** generated by the ADaM programs.

## Generated files (after running programs)

| File | Dataset | Description |
|------|---------|-------------|
| `adsl.sas7bdat` | ADSL | Subject-Level Analysis Dataset — 1 row per subject |
| `adae.sas7bdat` | ADAE | Adverse Events Analysis Dataset — 1 row per AE per subject |

## Key derived variables

### ADSL
| Variable | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `SAFFL` | Safety Population Flag (Y/N) |
| `ITTFL` | Intent-to-Treat Population Flag (Y/N) |
| `PPROTFL` | Per-Protocol Population Flag (Y/N) |
| `TRT01A` | Actual Treatment for Period 01 |
| `AGEGR1` | Pooled Age Group (<18 / 18-64 / >=65) |
| `TRTDURD` | Total Treatment Duration (days) |

### ADAE
| Variable | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `TRTEMFL` | Treatment-Emergent Adverse Event Flag (Y/N) |
| `ASTDT` | Analysis Start Date (SAS numeric) |
| `AENDT` | Analysis End Date (SAS numeric) |
| `ASTDY` | Study Day of AE Start relative to first dose |
| `AREL` | Analysis Causality Flag (Y/N) |

## How to generate

ADSL and ADAE require SDTM datasets to exist first:
```
programs/adam/adsl.sas   (requires sdtm.dm, sdtm.ex)
programs/adam/adae.sas   (requires sdtm.ae, adam.adsl)
```

## Standard

All datasets conform to **CDISC ADaM IG v1.3**.  
Datasets are excluded from version control — regenerate from source programs.
